JUDGE CARLOS LAROCHE DAVID MENDEZ, ATTY FOR PLTF. KATHLEEN HOWARD, ANITA STARK FOR DEFTS. 2:10 PM C/C FOR TRIAL BU JURY. ALL PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS, COURT & BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT. TRIAL CONT'D 9/2/93, 9AM.

JUDGE CARLOS LAROCHE 9:05 AM JURY TRIAL CONT'D. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COURT AND BOTH COUNSEL IN CHAMBERS. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS MADE AND ATTENDANCE MARKED. JURORS SWORN. 12 JURORS SEATED IN THE JURY BOX. 9:40 AM COURT CONVENED, ALL PARTIES, JURORS PRESENT. COURT DISCHARGED THE JURY, IN VIEW OF THE FACT THAT IN CHAMBERS COURT GRANTED A MOTION BY DEFTS FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING S ON THE GROUND THAT PLTF. IS NOT THE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY AND THEREFORE HAS NO STANDING IN COURT. IN VIEW OF RULING, COURT SAID JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFTS.
